tools.name: captions.getCaptions
tools.description:
Returns the caption output for a transcription job. We currently support SubRip (SRT) and Web Video Text Tracks (VTT) output.
Caption output format can be specified in the `Accept` header. Returns SRT by default.
***
Note: For streaming jobs, transient failure of our storage during a live session may prevent the final hypothesis elements from saving properly, resulting in an incomplete caption file. This is rare, but not impossible.

tools.name: jobs.deleteJobById
tools.description: Deletes a transcription job. All data related to the job, such as input media and transcript, will be permanently deleted. A job can only be deleted once it's completed (either with success or failure).

tools.name: jobs.getJobById
tools.description: Returns information about a transcription job

tools.name: jobs.getListOfJobs
tools.description: Gets a list of transcription jobs submitted within the last 30 days in reverse chronological order up to the provided `limit` number of jobs per call. **Note:** Jobs older than 30 days will not be listed. Pagination is supported via passing the last job `id` from a previous call into `starting_after`.

tools.name: jobs.submitTranscriptionJob
tools.description: Starts an asynchronous job to transcribe speech-to-text for a media file. Media files can be specified in two ways, either by including a public url to the media in the transcription job `options` or by uploading a local file as part of a multipart/form request.

tools.name: transcript.getTranscriptById
tools.description:
Returns the transcript for a completed transcription job. Transcript can be returned as either JSON or plaintext format. Transcript output format can be specified in the `Accept` header. Returns JSON by default.
***
Note: For streaming jobs, transient failure of our storage during a live session may prevent the final hypothesis elements from saving properly, resulting in an incomplete transcript. This is rare, but not impossible. To guarantee 100% completeness, we recommend capturing all final hypothesis when you receive them on the client.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
